events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: belt mistracking from off-center loading/idler skew is a `fail` at `high` risk — it risks belt edge damage/failure, friction-driven fire/spark exposure, and pinch-point injury during in-motion adjustment. Required immediate controls: LOTO before touching idlers/pulleys, correct chute/loading alignment, square the troughing/training idlers, verify guarding of nip points per OSHA 1910.212, clean up spillage/seal the load zone, then empty-run test before returning to loaded service.
